steps.t: The ice-floe can be found at the western end of Finglas' mead. Mossbeard has asked you to examine the unnatural ice-floe in Finglas' Mead.
The branches are above on a raised section of the hill. Perhaps you can look from atop the hill on the left side of the ice-floe. Mossbeard wants you …
The younger Huorn can be found on the hillside in north-west Balewood. Mossbeard wants you to search on the hillside for a sign of the Huorn. He hopes…
